components.name: alert
components.description: Displays a callout for user attention.

components.name: avatar
components.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

components.name: badge
components.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

components.name: button
components.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

components.name: card
components.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

components.name: dialog
components.description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window.

components.name: dropdown-menu
components.description: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a button.

components.name: input
components.description: Displays a form input field or a component that looks like an input field.

components.name: label
components.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

components.name: select
components.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from, triggered by a button.

components.name: switch
components.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

components.name: tabs
components.description: A set of layered sections of content displayed one at a time.

components.name: toast
components.description: A succinct message that is displayed temporarily.

components.name: tooltip
components.description: A popup that displays information related to an element.
